page: Microsoft Azure D4als_v7 is an x86_64 architecture virtual machine belonging to the Dalsv7 server family. It is powered by an AMD processor and runs on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. The instance features 4 dedicated virtual CPUs and 8.0 GB of system memory, yielding a resource density of 2.0 GB of RAM per core.

This server configuration does not include local storage, meaning it relies entirely on external storage options, though it is Premium Storage capable. There are no integrated GPUs, and the instance is provisioned with zero complimentary public IPv4 addresses.

With a 1:2 vCPU-to-RAM ratio, the D4als_v7 is structured as a compute-optimized resource. This low-memory profile offers a cost-effective option for workloads that require dedicated CPU resources but do not demand large memory footprints. Appropriate workloads include lightweight web serving, batch processing, microservices, and basic computational tasks that fit within the 8.0 GB memory limit.
description: The Microsoft Azure D4als_v7 is an x86_64 virtual machine from the Dalsv7 family, powered by an AMD processor and managed via the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. It features 4 dedicated vCPUs and 8.0 GB of system memory, establishing a 1:2 vCPU-to-RAM ratio. This low-memory configuration does not include local storage or integrated GPUs, but it is Premium Storage capable. Designed for compute-focused workloads with minimal memory requirements, the D4als_v7 provides a cost-efficient hardware profile for tasks such as lightweight web serving, microservices, batch processing, and distributed entry-level compute nodes.
og_description: Microsoft Azure D4als_v7 is a Dalsv7-family virtual machine featuring 4 dedicated AMD vCPUs, 8.0 GB of RAM, and Premium Storage capability for compute-focused, low-memory workloads.

tagline: A dedicated AMD-powered virtual machine featuring four vCPUs and a low-memory profile optimized for entry-level compute workloads.
bullet_points: Four dedicated AMD vCPUs on x86_64 architecture
8.0 GB of system memory providing 2.0 GB per core
Premium Storage capable with no local disk included
Suited for lightweight web serving, microservices, and batch processing
